title: Update to github.com/vbauerster/mpb/v8
body:
In https://github.com/containers/image/pull/1821 , c/image has updated from `github.com/vbauerster/mpb/v7` to `/v8`. 

Follow suit, so that Podman ships only one copy of that package. Also include the updated version of c/image immediately, so that this doesn’t show up as an increased bloat baseline.

(For the record, I didn’t actually try running the relevant Podman code; the progress bar usage in Podman seems low-risk enough, and unrelated to the changing parts of MPB, to just update.)

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```
